creator: jon@xyinn.org
text:
Adding here that I've been actually trying to get trash support working in Thunar on i3. After some research, I found probonod's debugging on some stuff regarding gvfs, which ultimately allowed me to get this working. I had to add:

export $(dbus-launch)

to my .xinitrc file right before I ran exec i3. I left more details here: https://github.com/helloSystem/hello/issues/28#issuecomment-1301170016

I wanted to post this here just in case this affects trash support in some negative (or unforeseen) way.
